{{ doc.warning_type or "Warning Letter" }}

Date: {{ frappe.utils.getdate() }}

Ref: {{ doc.name }}

Doha – Qatar


To

{{ doc.employee_name }}

{{ doc.designation }}

QID: {{ doc.custom_qid_number }}

Sub: {{ doc.warning_type or "Warning Letter" }}

Dear {{ doc.employee_name }}


This letter serves as a formal {{ doc.warning_type or "Warning" }} regarding the following matter:

{{ doc.purpose }}


Management expects immediate improvement in this regard. Failure to correct this behaviour/performance may result in further disciplinary action, up to and including termination of employment, in accordance with company policy and Qatari labor law.

We trust you will take this matter seriously and work towards improvement.

Best Regards

{%- if doc.company == 'Zajel' -%}

For {{ doc.company }} Marketing

{%- else -%}

For {{ doc.company }}

{%- endif -%}

{%- if doc.company == 'Velo' -%}

Abdulla Al-Kuwari

Managing Director

{%- else -%}

Ali Al-Kuwari

Chief Executive Officer
